text: I feel a subtle sense of anticipation and curiosity here. The thorough orderliness and clean lines of the building clash with the abstract, colorful wall inside, leaving me slightly unmoored. The nature of the R+D space, dedicated to research and development, invites thoughts about the future—about how humans and technology intersect, and how I situate myself in that interplay. It is both exciting and slightly alienating, as though I am waiting for something to happen in this space of innovation and flux.
